privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the Google Chrome configuration data (bookmarks, history, cookies) is synthetically generated and dynamically injected via Python scripts within setup_task.sh. The verified legal folders ('Court Dockets', 'Legal Research', 'E-Discovery'), personal domains to purge (Facebook, Netflix, etc.), and the sensitive keyword ('globex') to eliminate exactly match the instructions provided in the case workspace protocol. Furthermore, the required custom search engines, download directory ('/home/ga/Documents/TechCorp_Case'), and final export path ('/home/ga/Desktop/TechCorp_Bookmarks.html') strictly align with the task description and verifier logic.
